questions.scenario: A function should run when a message arrives on the receipt topic. Which trigger shape fits?

options.text: A load balancer URL map only.

questions.explanation: Pub/Sub is the event source, so a Pub/Sub trigger delivers the event to the function.

questions.scenario: A function should validate export files when they are created in a specific bucket. What should the trigger make clear?

options.text: The storage event and bucket scope that should invoke the handler.
The name of every VM in the project.

questions.explanation: A trigger should be scoped to the event source and event type the function actually handles.

questions.scenario: Which concerns belong to trigger design?

options.text: Who or what can invoke the function.
What event format the handler receives.
How many unrelated services can be hidden in one function.

questions.explanation: The trigger is part of the function's runtime contract.
